muhuka (von muhu) n. Augenblick: tigmā yadantaraśaniḥ patāti kasmiṃ cicchūra [Page5-0846] muhuke janānām  ṚV. 4,16,17 . yo asya śuṣmaṃ muhukairiyarti vāto na jūta stanayadbhirabhraiḥ 17,12 .
— Vgl. muhūrta.
